general.title: General Settings
general.description: Manage workspace info and notification settings.

webhook.title: Integration
webhook.description: Connect external messengers to receive risk signals and reports detected by AI Insight.
webhook.slackHelp: Enter the Incoming Webhook URL issued from the Slack app settings.
webhook.kakaoHelp: Requires an official Alimtalk Delivery API key with business authentication completed.

layout.title: Settings
layout.description: Configure your organization preferences and billing details.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of your dashboard. Changes are saved automatically and applied globally. (White-labeling)
appearance.companyNameHelp: This name will appear on the top left sidebar and in custom reports.
appearance.colorPreviewDesc: UI elements like buttons, active navigation, and charts will use this brand color to give your dashboard a cohesive whitelist feel. Note: Due to Tailwind's JIT compiler, exact preset color shades require modifying CSS variables in production.
appearance.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all appearance settings to default?

audit.title: Immutable Audit Logs
audit.description: A persistent, tamper-evident record of all major system events in your organization.
audit.empty: No audit logs found for this organization.

security.title: Enterprise Security & SSO
security.description: Manage Single Sign-On (SSO) and enforce security policies across your entire organization.
security.samlDescription: Connect your identity provider (IdP) such as Okta, Azure AD, or Google Workspace.
security.helpDesc: For custom SAML mapping, SCIM user provisioning, or dedicated VPN tunnels, please contact your dedicated Enterprise Technical Account Manager.

push.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
push.alreadyGranted: Push notifications are already allowed. Block them in your OS settings if necessary.
push.successBody: Push notifications have been successfully mapped! You can now receive important alerts like ROAS drops.
push.denied: Push notification permission denied. Please allow it in your browser settings.
push.error: An error occurred while requesting permission.
push.title: Emergency Push Notifications (Web Push)
push.description: Receive anomaly alerts for campaign budgets and performance on your smartphone or desktop even when the browser or app is closed.
push.blocked: Notification permission is blocked in your browser settings. Please refresh after changing the settings.

loginForm.title: B2B SaaS Dashboard
loginForm.subtitle: Log in to your account to manage marketing performance

registerForm.title: Sign Up
registerForm.subtitle: Create a new organization or join an existing one
registerForm.orgHelp: Data is separated based on the Organization ID.

Dashboard.summaryDesc: Monitor your ad campaigns and key metrics centrally
Dashboard.trendcastingDesc: 7-day linear regression forecast based on recent ad spend
Dashboard.performanceDesc: ROAS and estimated conversions trend graph

anomaly.noAlertsDesc: No recent anomalies detected. Campaigns are running normally.

insights.title: AI Performance Insights
insights.mock1Desc: FashionBrand A's ROAS increased by 15% from last week. We recommend increasing the budget by 20%.
insights.mock2Desc: CTR for Brand Awareness campaign dropped sharply. Urgent ad creative replacement is required.

performanceChart.empty: No active campaigns to draw the chart.

mediaChart.empty: No active media data to draw the chart.

CampaignList.title: Campaign List
CampaignList.optimizeLoading: AI is analyzing data for optimization...

CampaignTable.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete campaign '{name}'?

Billing.title: Billing & Subscriptions
Billing.description: Manage your workspace plans, billing history, and team usage.
Billing.usageMessage: You are currently using 2 of 3 available campaigns on this free tier.

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for individuals and side projects.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: For small teams and growing agencies.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large scale operations and custom needs.

Reports.title: Custom Reports
Reports.description: Generate and schedule branded white-label reports for your clients.
Reports.success: Report successfully generated and queued for delivery!
Reports.previewHelp: Reports will be generated with your custom logo and primary color scheme.

Users.title: Users
Users.description: View and manage your team members and their roles.
Users.directoryDesc: View and edit all users registered within this organization.

table.empty: No members registered in this organization.
table.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the organization?

invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.description: Set up an email address and role to invite a new team member.
invite.success: An invitation email has been sent to {email}.
